org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.graphics

Class SwingViewGraphics2D

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.vector.AbstractVectorGraphics2D
      • org.arakhne.afc.ui.swing.zoom.ZoomableGraphics2D
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.graphics.SwingViewGraphics2D
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VectorGraphics2D, ZoomableContext, ViewGraphics2D

    public class SwingViewGraphics2D
extends ZoomableGraphics2D
implements ViewGraphics2D
    This is the swing-based implementation of a ViewGraphics2D. This implementation support zooms.
    Version:
    NetEditor Swing Panel $Revision$ 2013-10-23 21:03:09
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-swingpanel

    • Constructor Detail

      • SwingViewGraphics2D

        public SwingViewGraphics2D(Graphics2D canvas,
                   float scaleFactor,
                   CenteringTransform centeringTransform,
                   Color background,
                   boolean isAntiAlias,
                   float scalingSensitivity,
                   float focusX,
                   float focusY,
                   float minScaleFactor,
                   float maxScaleFactor)
        Parameters:
        canvas -
        scaleFactor - is the scaling factor to apply.
        centeringTransform - is the transformation used to draw the objects at the center of the view.
        background - is the background color.
        isAntiAlias - indicates if antialiasing is used when drawing.
        scalingSensitivity - is the sensitivity of the scaling actions.
        focusX - is the coordinate of the focus point.
        focusY - is the coordinate of the focus point.
        minScaleFactor - is the minimal allowed scaling factor.
        maxScaleFactor - is the maximal allowed scaling factor.

      • isShadowDrawing

        public boolean isShadowDrawing()
        Description copied from interface: ViewGraphics2D
        Indicates if the drawings are for shadows or not.
        Specified by:
        isShadowDrawing in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Returns:
        true if the drawings are for shadows, false otherwise.

        Replies the bounds of the current view. This bounds may changed dynamically.

        Returns:
        the bounds of the associated view.

        Replies the shape of the current view. This bounds may changed dynamically.

        getCurrentViewComponentShape in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Returns:
        the shape of the associated view.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Transform2D localTransformation)
        Description copied from interface: ViewGraphics2D
        Start a rendering context for a sub-component but with the specified local transformation.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        localTransformation - is the local transformation to apply to.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Shape2f viewShape,
                        Rectangle2f bounds)
        Description copied from interface: ViewGraphics2D
        Start a rendering context for a component.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        viewShape - is the shape of the component. It could be null to use the specified bounds.
        bounds - are the bounds of the component, never null.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Shape2f viewShape,
                        Rectangle2f bounds,
                        Color fillColor,
                        Color lineColor)
        Description copied from interface: ViewGraphics2D
        Start a rendering context for a component.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        viewShape - is the shape of the component. It could be null to use the specified bounds.
        bounds - are the bounds of the component, never null.
        fillColor - is the color to use to fill the objects.
        lineColor - is the color to use to draw the outlines of the objects.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Color fillColor,
                        Color lineColor)
        Description copied from interface: ViewGraphics2D
        Start a rendering context for a sub-component but this the specified local transformation.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        fillColor - is the color to use to fill the objects.
        lineColor - is the color to use to draw the outlines of the objects.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Shape2f viewShape,
                        Rectangle2f bounds,
                        Color fillColor,
                        Color lineColor,
                        Transform2D localTransformation)
        Description copied from interface: ViewGraphics2D
        Start a rendering context for a component.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        viewShape - is the shape of the component. It could be null to use the specified bounds.
        bounds - are the bounds of the component, never null.
        fillColor - is the color to use to fill the objects.
        lineColor - is the color to use to draw the outlines of the objects.
        localTransformation - is the local transformation to apply to.
